message:
fix(atc): use saturating_sub in server ATC engine timestamp arithmetic

Two unsafe i64 subtractions in the ATC engine's hot path:

1. silence_duration() (line 1668): `now_micros - self.last_activity_ts`
   The `.max(0)` clamped the result but didn't prevent the subtraction
   from panicking in debug mode with clock skew.

2. Probe VoI scheduling (line 8224): `now_micros - entry.probe_sent_at`
   Same pattern — `.max(0)` hid the result but the subtraction itself
   was unsafe.

Both now use saturating_sub before the .max(0) clamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
